desc_short: Clarity over precision. If it’s unclear, don’t argue.
desc_long: Line of Sight should be obvious, Cover should be simple, and disputes should be rare and brief. The Canyon is dangerous enough without arguments.
fast_resolution: If players cannot quickly agree: the shot does not happen OR the target gains Cover. Choose the option that keeps the game moving.
title: Visibility Vault

line_of_sight.desc_short: If there’s doubt, LoS is blocked.
line_of_sight.desc_long: A clear, believable line between attacker and target. If there is doubt, Line of Sight is blocked.
line_of_sight.title: Line Of Sight

blockers.elevation_rule: Elevation does not override solid blockers. Being higher does not allow models to see over walls or cliffs.

cover_mechanics.desc_short: Cover gives +1 Defense vs ranged attacks.
cover_mechanics.desc_long: Cover represents partial obstruction that makes a model harder to hit. It is not total protection.
cover_mechanics.title: Cover Mechanics
negation_triggers: Attacker is within the same terrain piece as the target.
Model is Exposed by an ability or effect.

terrain_trait_interactions.result: Cover may be lost if terrain collapses
